components.text: This is how the Golden Sun Leaf looks! It gets its appearance from absorbing a lot of sun light!

Golden Sun Leaf is a mystical herb that has Absorbed the suns Light!

By absorbing so much of the sunlight it has gained the Fire Element, 
This herb also boosts Yang Energy, Enhances Stamina and Cultivation Speed

Golden Sun Leaf is rarely found by cutting down the Golden Palm Tree

The Golden Palm Tree can be found in beach biomes very rarely! 
This Herb is also one of the Common Herbs that can be found!
